svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 190px; margin-left: 41px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 178px; height: 1px; padding-top: 190px; margin-left: 271px;

div.div: Dart コンパイルパイプライン (3 系統の出力)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 638px; height: 1px; padding-top: 310px; margin-left: 42px;

div.div:
開発時は JIT で hot reload を有効にし、リリース時は AOT でネイティブにビルドする。
Web 向けは dart2js (JavaScript) または dart2wasm (WebAssembly) で出力する。
